# truenas_iscsi_extent (Data Source)

Provides information about an iSCSI extent on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_extent" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "iscsi_extent_path" {
  value = data.truenas_iscsi_extent.example.path
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric iSCSI extent ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `blocksize` (Number) Block size in bytes.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disk` (String) The zvol path for DISK type extents.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the extent is enabled.
- `filesize` (Number) File size in bytes.
- `insecure_tpc` (Boolean) Whether insecure TPC is enabled.
- `name` (String) The extent name.
- `path` (String) The file path for FILE type extents.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the extent is read-only.
- `rpm` (String) Reported RPM.
- `type` (String) The extent type (DISK or FILE).
- `xen` (Boolean) Xen compatibility mode.
